title: Hello Java
description: Write a classic Hello World program and understand the main method structure.
problemStatement:
Every Java program must be inside a class. Create a class `Main` with a `public static void main(String[] args)` method. Inside it, use `System.out.println()` to print `"Hello, Java Programmer!"`.

**Requirement:** The output must match exactly.
hints: Remember that Java is case-sensitive (Main != main).
